description: Build a procedural sector generator that assembles rooms from hand-designed templates into connected floor layouts. For MVP, generate 3 sector types (Docking Ring, Habitation Deck, Engineering) with corridors, doors, and guaranteed points of interest.
acceptance_criteria: Given a new run starts, when a sector is generated, then it produces a connected graph of 8-15 rooms linked by corridors.
Room templates are defined as JSON data files specifying tile layout, door positions, and object placement slots.
At least 5 distinct room templates exist per sector type (15 total for 3 sectors).
Every generated sector has at least one guaranteed loot room, one terminal room, and one enemy encounter room.
Corridors connect rooms via door tiles that can be opened, closed, or locked.
No rooms are inaccessible — the generator validates full connectivity before finalizing.
Each sector type uses distinct floor/wall tile variants (e.g., metal grating for Engineering, carpet for Habitation).
spec_section: 7.2 Station Sectors, 11.1 MVP Scope (Procedural sector generation)
notes: MVP spec says 4 weeks / 3 sectors. This is the largest single story — consider splitting room template authoring into a separate story if needed. Cogmind approach: hand-designed rooms assembled procedurally.
